name: William Adler
description:
Okay, this is one of the earliest bots I've made, but I have yet to publish it. It has underwent a lot of changes during its lifetime, and now, it's for yours to enjoy.

William Adler. Sheriff of Echo from The Smoke Room.

I added a little bit about his friends, enemies, and something else. Please do enjoy.

I forgot who did the art, if you know, leave a review!

PS: I have alternate versions of him, including a Japanese one, and one set in modern times.
creator: ihaveawindows
